single_seed_7b_baselines.note: The repository protocol explicitly reports 7B baselines as single-seed, separately from the three-seed encoder protocol.

requested_three_seed_7b_extension.note: User-requested extension beyond the original single-seed 7B protocol.

private_research_terms.note: Project materials are restricted to private non-commercial research; raw text redistribution is prohibited.

visobert_public_release_permission.human_action: Required only before a public raw-text dataset release; archive permission from the source rights holder.

external_benchmark_provenance.note: UIT datasets and AIVIVN are evaluation-only, not ViPragSent sources.

rationale_faithfulness_audit.note: Waived by the final protocol. Generated rationales must not be described as manually faithfulness-verified.

paper_manuscript.human_action: Write the manuscript only from generated JSON/tables and cite no inherited main.pdf values.
